# Jonathan Strange & Mr. Norrell

Monsters: Fae (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Fae%205500607938cb414c990fa91574d300cf.md), Curses (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Curses%208d8f367d6fdd47a580868227f4274a51.md), Eldritch horrors (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Eldritch%20horrors%209d977fe97699437880fbc4b55651f78c.md)
Motivations: Family provision (../../Features/Family%20provision%20a4f827664b094b91ae244ffa2385ce4d.md), A wholesome marriage is beautiful (../../Features/A%20wholesome%20marriage%20is%20beautiful%20729f8c8cb3774419a3611b8961a5da02.md), Dependency (../../Features/Dependency%20f8d48d2c02f44f60a17266d67d4d045f.md), Feminine duties (../../Features/Feminine%20duties%20dda5bbf7da044e799df53801b873a5c6.md), Supernatural forces few people can see (../../Features/Supernatural%20forces%20few%20people%20can%20see%201dbf653b6a894de39bbc08de004b862f.md), Constrained intellectual energy (../../Features/Constrained%20intellectual%20energy%20bd4dd7ba301a4786bbd8d03d6b948467.md), Wife submitted to husband (../../Features/Wife%20submitted%20to%20husband%202a2578582cab480b945c275e41ee9995.md), Cosmic horror (../../Features/Cosmic%20horror%207015e32dadb042b995663e84d5b48388.md), Heart (../../Features/Heart%202d558e628ba28080869ecf8b7cb495ed.md)
Pacing: Weeks (../Pacing%20types/Weeks%20948903aabaff4071b42a7005cbe643f6.md)
Plot is driven by MC desire: True
Story scale: Full story (../Story%20scales/Full%20story%20faaea9bcaf0f43b5ae79dfa06b96be34.md)

Wonder: 0

<aside>
💡

I connected this with [Cosmic horror](../../Features/Cosmic%20horror%207015e32dadb042b995663e84d5b48388.md) because while it wouldn’t officially be considered cosmic horror, so much of the way it handles mysterious, powerful, otherworldly forces invading our world aligns with cosmic horror.

</aside>
